sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ أَمْرٌ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Zaštita ličnih informacija na internetu je veoma važna stvar.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting personal information on the internet is very important.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا اسْتِخْدَامُ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِسَابَاتِنَا الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo koristiti jake lozinke za naše elektronske račune.
sentences.translationEn: We must use strong passwords for our electronic accounts.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْخُبَرَاءُ بِعَدَمِ الضَّغْطِ عَلَى الرَّوَابِطِ الْمَشْبُوهَةِ أَوْ غَيْرِ الْمَعْرُوفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci savjetuju da se ne klikće na sumnjive ili nepoznate linkove.
sentences.translationEn: Experts advise not to click on suspicious or unknown links.

sentences.arabic: يُحَافِظُ الْأَمْنُ السِّيبِرَانِيُّ عَلَى بَيَانَاتِنَا الرَّقْمِيَّةِ مِنَ الْمُخْتَرِقِينَ.
sentences.translation: Cyber sigurnost čuva naše digitalne podatke od hakera.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity keeps our digital data safe from hackers.
